data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of self-service redownload within policy constraints, but the evidence does not provide any confirmation that this functionality is available. The linked use case mentions a unified view of customer purchases but does not specify the ability to redownload items. Additionally, the prior steps do not include any evidence that directly addresses the self-service redownload capability, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming self-service redownload functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
